name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn, i

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes are idle, turn is 1 *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "idle"
        /\ turn = 1

(* Process i's transition *)

  (* Trying to enter critical section *)
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  /\ turn' = turn
  (* Entering critical section *)
  \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
     /\ turn = i
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  (* Exiting critical section *)
  \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
     /\ turn' = (turn % N) + 1
  (* No change *)
  \/ /\ state' = state
     /\ turn' = turn

(* Next state: any process can make a transition *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N: Process(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Mutual exclusion: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N: i /= j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ coordinator = "idle"

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "idle"
           /\ coordinator' = "prepare"
           /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = "prepare"
           /\ participants' = [p \in 1..N |-> "voteYes"]
           /\ coordinator' = "voteYes"

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = "prepare"
          /\ participants' = [p \in 1..N |-> "voteNo"]
          /\ coordinator' = "voteNo"

Commit == /\ coordinator = "voteYes"
          /\ participants' = [p \in 1..N |-> "commit"]
          /\ coordinator' = "commit"

Abort == /\ coordinator = "voteNo"
         /\ participants' = [p \in 1..N |-> "abort"]
         /\ coordinator' = "abort"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State variables
VARIABLES forks, states

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]  \* fork i is owned by philosopher forks[i]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, forks are free
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]  \* each fork i is free (owned by philosopher i)
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

\* Helper predicates
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Action: philosopher i picks up left fork
PickLeft(i) == 
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0]  \* fork i is now owned by philosopher i

\* Action: philosopher i picks up right fork
PickRight(i) == 
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = 0]  \* fork Right(i) is now owned by philosopher i

\* Action: philosopher i puts down left fork
PutLeft(i) == 
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i]  \* fork i is now free

\* Action: philosopher i puts down right fork
PutRight(i) == 
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]  \* fork Right(i) is now free

\* Action: philosopher i starts eating
StartEating(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]  \* both forks are now owned by philosopher i

\* Action: philosopher i stops eating
StopEating(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]  \* both forks are now free

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        \/ PickLeft(i)
        \/ PickRight(i)
        \/ StartEating(i)
        \/ StopEating(i)

\* Fairness constraints
Fairness == 
    \A i \in 1..N : WF_vars(PickLeft(i) \/ PickRight(i) \/ StartEating(i) \/ StopEating(i))

Spec == Init /\ Fairness /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
NoDeadlock == 
    \A i \in 1..N : states[i] # "eating" \/ states[Right(i)] # "eating"

THEOREM Spec => []NoDeadlock

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking")

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry")

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating")

THEOREM Spec => TypeOK

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" \/ states[i] = "eating")

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" \/ states[i] = "thinking")

THEOREM Spec => <>(\A i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating" \/ states[i] = "thinking")

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in 1..N \cup {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote(term, candidateId) == 
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ term >= currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = candidateId
  /\ state' = "Follower"

Vote(term, candidateId) == 
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ term = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ state' = "Candidate"

BecomeLeader == 
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote(currentTerm, votedFor)
        \/ Vote(currentTerm, votedFor)
        \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>>
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers)
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), r)
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers)
        /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), r)
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
     /\ readers' = <<>>
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
  where vars == <<readers, writer_active>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [promisedBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN 
        LET maxBallotVal == Max({acceptors[j].chosenBallot : j \in 1..N}) 
            maxBallotValVal == IF maxBallotVal = 0 THEN NULL ELSE acceptors[CHOOSE j \in 1..N : acceptors[j].chosenBallot = maxBallotVal].chosenValue
        IN proposers[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> maxBallotVal, chosenValue -> maxBallotValVal]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> b, chosenValue -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, <<p, b, v>>)

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, <<p, b, v>>)
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Nat, promisedBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Nat, chosenBallot: Nat, chosenValue: V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in Seq(<<Nat)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES acked, retransmits, sent

    /\ file = Seq(1) \* dummy file contents
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sent = {} \* no chunks sent yet
    /\ acked = {} \* no chunks acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0] \* no retransmissions yet

SendChunk == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, acked>>
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
        /\ i \notin sent
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
        /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED retransmits

AckChunk == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent, retransmits>>
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
        /\ i \in sent
        /\ i \notin acked
        /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED acked

RetransmitChunk == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent, acked>>
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : 
        /\ i \in sent
        /\ i \notin acked
        /\ retransmits[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = retransmits[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED sent

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckChunk
    \/ RetransmitChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

vars == <<file, chunks, sent, acked, retransmits>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sent \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ acked \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmits \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]
    /\ \A i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : retransmits[i] <= MAX_RETRIES

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Key, Value

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId

(* db: mapping from key to value *)
(* txns: mapping from transaction id to transaction state *)
(* nextTxId: next transaction id to assign *)

(* Transaction state: [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"}, readSet: [key: Key -> Value], writeSet: [key: Key -> Value]] *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ db \in [Key -> Value]
  /\ txns \in [Nat -> [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"}, readSet: [Key -> Value], writeSet: [Key -> Value]]
  /\ nextTxId \in Nat

Init == 
  /\ db = [k \in Key |-> 0]
  /\ txns = [ ]
  /\ nextTxId = 1

BeginTx == 
  /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
  /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = [id |-> nextTxId, status |-> "active", readSet |-> [k \in Key |-> 0], writeSet |-> [k \in Key |-> 0]]]
  /\ UNCHANGED db

Read == 
  \E txId \in DOMAIN txns : \E key \in Key :
    /\ txns[txId].status = "active"
    /\ txns[txId].readSet[key] = 0
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].readSet[key] = db[key]]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId

Write == 
  \E txId \in DOMAIN txns : \E key \in Key : \E value \in Value :
    /\ txns[txId].status = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].writeSet[key] = value]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId

Commit == 
  \E txId \in DOMAIN txns:
    /\ txns[txId].status = "active"
    /\ \A key \in Key: db[key] = txns[txId].readSet[key] \* no write-write conflicts
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k \in Key] = txns[txId].writeSet[k]]
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "committed"]
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId

Abort == 
  \E txId \in DOMAIN txns:
    /\ txns[txId].status = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId

Next == 
  \/ BeginTx
  \/ Read
  \/ Write
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + Random(-epsilon, epsilon)]
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i] + offsets'[i]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i] + offsets'[i] \FORALL i \in 1..N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \* offsets are integers for simplicity

---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :

Total(n) == \Sum m \in Node : counts[n][m]

GlobalCount == \Sum n \in Node : Total(n)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
